# YTGrowth

> YTGrowth is a YouTube analytics tool and AI YouTube channel audit platform
> for creators who want to grow without spending hours decoding dashboards.
> Positioned as a VidIQ alternative, TubeBuddy alternative, and Viewstats
> alternative, it bundles a YouTube SEO tool, thumbnail scoring, competitor
> analysis, and keyword research into one YouTube optimization tool that
> answers how to grow your YouTube channel by turning the data VidIQ and
> TubeBuddy show you into a prioritized action plan you can work through in
> an hour. Among the best YouTube tools for creators who want prescriptions,
> not raw metrics.

## What it is

YTGrowth (https://ytgrowth.io) is a SaaS platform for YouTube creators
who want to grow their channel without spending hours interpreting
analytics. Connect your YouTube channel via Google OAuth and the platform
performs a 10-dimension audit covering traffic sources, audience
demographics, posting patterns, click-through rate, retention, engagement
quality, content strategy, SEO discovery, thumbnail health, and competitor
positioning. The output is a ranked list of fixes, not another dashboard
you have to interpret.

The product positions itself as "the AI that audits your channel like a
$500/hour consultant." It targets the gap between raw-analytics tools
(VidIQ, TubeBuddy, Social Blade) and personal coaching, by automating the
interpretation step that most creators outsource.

## Who it's for

- Solo YouTubers (1K–100K subscribers) trying to grow without a team.
- Multi-channel agencies managing 3–10 client channels in one workspace.
- Faceless / niche-channel operators optimising for reliable growth.
- Coaches and consultants using it as a diagnostic on client channels.
- Creators who are tired of vanity-metric dashboards and want to know
  what to do next.

## Core features

- **Channel Audit**: A 10-dimension AI audit of your channel: traffic
  sources, device split, audience demographics, posting cadence, CTR,
  retention curves, engagement quality, content-strategy fit, SEO
  discovery, thumbnail health, and benchmarking against your real
  competitors. Returns a prioritized action list with severity tags.

- **Competitor Analysis**: You pick 2–10 channels in your niche.
  YTGrowth runs their last 30 uploads through 7 dimensions (topics,
  title/SEO, posting cadence, video length, engagement, thumbnails,
  content gaps) and returns a threat-level score, a ranked gap report
  with a specific action and impact tag per gap, and ready-to-publish
  video ideas, not just raw stats to interpret yourself.

- **SEO Studio**: Title and description optimizer that scores against
  search demand, keyword fit, hook strength, length, and competitor
  patterns. Suggests rewrites you can apply with one click via the
  YouTube Data API.

- **Thumbnail IQ**: Two-layer thumbnail scoring: an algorithmic CTR
  prediction plus a vision model checking text contrast, face/object
  placement, emotion, and composition against high-performing
  thumbnails in your niche.

- **Keyword Explorer**: Search volume, competition score, and ranking
  difficulty for any topic. Surfaces low-competition / high-intent
  keywords that creators in your niche are missing.

- **Video Ideas**: Generates ideas based on your channel's existing
  performance patterns, trending topics, and competitor gaps. Each idea
  comes with a working title, target keyword, and rationale.

- **Title Optimizer**: Quick A/B-style scoring of title variants against
  search and click-through models.

- **Post-Publish Review**: Within 24 hours of a new upload, a focused
  audit of how that specific video is performing relative to your
  channel baseline and what to fix on the next one.

- **Weekly Reports**: Automated email digest of channel performance,
  upcoming opportunities, and what to publish next.

- **Multi-channel support**: Manage up to 10 channels under one account
  on the Agency plan, with pooled credits.

## Pricing

Free tier:
- 1 channel · free trial, first audit free · limited Thumbnail IQ ·
  view-only Keyword Explorer · no Competitor Analysis.

Solo, $19/month or $190/year (~$15.83/month equivalent):
- 3 channels · 20 AI analyses/month · full SEO Studio · full Keyword
  Explorer · Title Optimizer · Video Ideas · Competitor Analysis
  (2 rivals) · standard Thumbnail IQ.

Growth, $49/month or $490/year:
- 5 channels · 50 AI analyses/month · everything in Solo plus weekly
  email reports · Competitor Analysis (5 rivals) · increased
  Thumbnail IQ credits.

Agency, $149/month or $1,490/year:
- 10 pooled channels · 150 AI analyses/month · everything in Growth
  plus priority support · Competitor Analysis (10 rivals) · maximum
  Thumbnail IQ credits.

Lifetime variants of each tier are available as one-time purchases
(Solo $149, Growth $169, Agency $949). Top-up packs (20 / 60 / 150
analyses) sit on top of any plan and never expire.

## Affiliate program

30% recurring commission on every payment for as long as a referred
customer stays subscribed. 30-day cookie window, $50 payout minimum,
monthly via PayPal or bank transfer. Open to all creators, no approval
required, instant link generation. Sign up at
https://affiliates.ytgrowth.io.

## How it differs from VidIQ and TubeBuddy

VidIQ and TubeBuddy show you data and let you interpret it. YTGrowth runs
an AI audit on top of the same data and tells you specifically what to
change, in what order, and why. The Channel Audit alone replaces the kind
of report a YouTube growth consultant would charge $300–$500 for.

## Free Tools

No signup, no email, free forever. Full list at https://ytgrowth.io/tools.

Calculators:
- [YouTube Money Calculator](https://ytgrowth.io/tools/youtube-money-calculator): Real RPM by niche and audience country, not one flat range. Type your monthly views for an earnings estimate.
- [YouTube Subscriber Money Calculator](https://ytgrowth.io/tools/youtube-subscriber-money-calculator): Estimate earnings, ad revenue, and pay per subscriber, with view-per-sub ratios and niche CPM.
- [YouTube Shorts Money Calculator](https://ytgrowth.io/tools/youtube-shorts-money-calculator): Estimate Shorts ad earnings from the shared-pool RPM by views and country, and why Shorts pay less than long-form.

Research & analysis:
- [YouTube Keyword Research](https://ytgrowth.io/tools/youtube-keyword-research): See the real competition for any keyword: ranking channel size, view ceiling, and how crowded the term is.
- [YouTube Channel Stats Checker](https://ytgrowth.io/tools/youtube-channel-stats-checker): Live subscriber count, total views, monthly uploads, and engagement for any public channel.
- [Top YouTube Channels by Subscribers](https://ytgrowth.io/youtube-stats): Leaderboards across 14 niches and 4 countries (US, UK, Canada, Australia), refreshed monthly from YouTube's own API, 500K-subscriber minimum to filter out noise. Country pages: [United States](https://ytgrowth.io/youtube-stats/country/united-states), [United Kingdom](https://ytgrowth.io/youtube-stats/country/united-kingdom), [Canada](https://ytgrowth.io/youtube-stats/country/canada), [Australia](https://ytgrowth.io/youtube-stats/country/australia).

Generators:
- [YouTube Title Generator](https://ytgrowth.io/tools/youtube-title-generator): A dozen click-worthy title ideas, plus a scorer for any title on length, numbers, power words, and keyword fit.
- [YouTube Description Generator](https://ytgrowth.io/tools/youtube-description-generator): Builds an SEO-friendly description with a keyword hook, timestamps, links, and hashtags.
- [YouTube Tag Generator](https://ytgrowth.io/tools/youtube-tag-generator): Enter a topic, get relevant tags and variations trimmed to YouTube's 500-character limit.
- [YouTube Hashtag Generator](https://ytgrowth.io/tools/youtube-hashtag-generator): Enter a topic, get relevant hashtags for the title or description.
- [YouTube Chapter Generator](https://ytgrowth.io/tools/youtube-chapter-generator): Builds a chapter block that passes YouTube's rules (starts at 0:00, 3+ chapters, 10s apart), with live validation.
- [YouTube Video Ideas Generator](https://ytgrowth.io/tools/youtube-video-ideas-generator): 90+ proven content idea formats across 9 categories.
- [YouTube Channel Name Generator](https://ytgrowth.io/tools/youtube-channel-name-generator): 60+ name ideas for YouTubers, vloggers, and gaming channels.

Thumbnails:
- [YouTube Thumbnail Tester](https://ytgrowth.io/tools/youtube-thumbnail-tester): Compare two thumbnails side by side at real feed size, on mobile and suggested.
- [YouTube Thumbnail Downloader](https://ytgrowth.io/tools/youtube-thumbnail-downloader): Download any thumbnail from a video URL in HD, Max Res, JPG, or PNG.
- [YouTube Thumbnail Resizer](https://ytgrowth.io/tools/youtube-thumbnail-resizer): Resize any image to HD, Full HD, or 4K, auto-fit under YouTube's 2MB cap, runs in the browser.
- [YouTube Banner Resizer](https://ytgrowth.io/tools/youtube-banner-resizer): Export at the exact 2560x1440 spec with a live safe-zone preview for mobile, desktop, and TV.

## Guides and articles

In-depth guides on growing, optimizing, and monetizing a YouTube
channel. Full archive at https://ytgrowth.io/blog.

- [Best Microphone for YouTube: Every Setup and Budget (2026)](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/best-youtube-mic): Honest mic picks for every budget and content type, what top creators actually use, and why a good mic grows a channel faster than a better camera.
- [Copyright-Free Music for YouTube: The Best Free and Royalty-Free Sources (2026)](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/copyright-free-music): The safest free and royalty-free music sources, how Content ID really works, and how to add music to any video without a copyright strike.
- [What Is a Good Click-Through Rate on YouTube? CTR Benchmarks for 2026](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-ctr): What counts as a good YouTube CTR, the real benchmarks by traffic source, niche, and channel size, and how to read them in 2026.
- [How to Get Sponsorships on YouTube in 2026 (Even With a Small Channel)](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-sponsorships): How YouTube sponsorships work even on a small channel: what to charge, how to build a media kit, and the pitch that gets replies.
- [How Much Do YouTube Shorts Pay in 2026? The Real Numbers (and Why the Payout Isn't the Point)](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-shorts-pay): What YouTube Shorts really pay per 1,000 views, how the revenue-pool model works, what changes your rate, and why ad payout is the smallest reason to post.
- [The Best Time to Post on YouTube in 2026 (and Why Your Own Data Beats Any Chart)](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/best-time-to-post): The best times to post videos and Shorts by day, content type, and region, how often to upload by content type and channel stage, and how to find your own best time from YouTube Analytics.
- [Faceless YouTube Channel Ideas: The Niches That Pay and How to Stay Monetized in 2026](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/faceless-youtube-channel-ideas): 23 faceless channel ideas ranked by CPM, how to validate a niche before committing, and how to stay monetized under YouTube's 2025 rules.
- [The Best Chrome Extensions for YouTube Creators in 2026 (and How to Choose Them)](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/chrome-extensions-for-youtube): The Chrome extensions worth installing, grouped by job (research, competitor analysis, recording, workflow), and how to vet one before trusting it.
- [YouTube RPM Explained: What It Means, What Affects It, and How to Increase It](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-rpm): What YouTube RPM means, why it moves, the niches that pay 3 to 10x more than average, and the five levers that lift the number in your Revenue tab.
- [Best Free YouTube Keyword Research Tools (2026 Comparison)](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-keyword-research-tools): The best free keyword research tools, the data each delivers, the paid options worth it, and a workflow that turns research into publish decisions.
- [Best YouTube Analytics Tools: A Complete Guide for Creators and Brands](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-analytics-tools): The best analytics tools organized by the gap each fills (competitor data, keyword research, A/B testing, auditing), plus a stack by channel size.
- [YouTube Analytics Explained: Every Tab and Metric That Matters](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-analytics): A complete guide to YouTube Studio analytics: every tab, the metrics that drive growth, reading traffic sources, and checking any channel's public stats.
- [YouTube Description Template: How to Write Video and Channel Descriptions That Work](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-description-template): Ready description templates for every video type plus a channel description template, and the best practices for both.
- [How to Write a YouTube Title That Ranks and Gets Clicked](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-title): The core rules of a clickable, rankable YouTube title, seven proven formulas, and a three-question test to run before publishing.
- [How to Get More Views on YouTube: 11 Strategies That Work in 2026](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/more-views-on-youtube): 11 strategies that move the three levers behind views: impressions, click-through rate, and retention.
- [YouTube Channel Audit: A Step-by-Step Guide to Finding What Is Holding Your Channel Back](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-channel-audit): An eight-step channel audit across branding, SEO, CTR, retention, traffic, audience, competitors, and Shorts, with a checklist to run every quarter.
- [TubeBuddy vs vidIQ: Which YouTube Growth Tool Is Right for You in 2026?](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/tubebuddy-vs-vidiq): TubeBuddy vs vidIQ across features, pricing, and free plans, and which one fits the stage your channel is at.
- [Why Is My YouTube Channel Not Growing? 10 Reasons and How to Fix Each One](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-channel-not-growing): The 10 real reasons a channel stops growing, a three-metric diagnostic to find which is yours, and the priority order to fix them in.
- [YouTube Trends: How to Find What's Trending and Use It Before It Peaks (2026)](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-trends): How to find YouTube trends and trending topics early, validate real search demand, and publish before the topic saturates.
- [Google AdSense for YouTube: How It Works, Setup, and Getting Paid (2026)](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/google-adsense-youtube): How Google AdSense for YouTube works: setup and linking, the approval and tax steps, when you get paid, and the mistakes that get accounts suspended.
- [vidIQ Review (2026): Is It Worth It, and the Free Alternative](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/vidiq-review): An honest 2026 vidIQ review: what the extension does, every pricing tier including Coaching, the real Capterra rating, where users hit billing and accuracy issues, and how to cover the same jobs free.
- [YouTube Video Ideas for Beginners: 10 Ideas That Work With Zero Subscribers](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-video-ideas): 10 search-driven, low-production video formats that work from zero subscribers, plus a research framework for finding your own ideas.
- [YouTube CPM Rates: The Best Niches and How to Maximize Your Ad Revenue](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-cpm): What CPM is and how it differs from RPM, average rates by category, the niches that pay 10x more, and the levers that lift your CPM without changing niche.
- [YouTube Tags for Views: The Best Tags to Use and How to Find Them](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-tags): What makes a tag drive views, the best tags by niche, hashtags vs metadata tags, and a 15-tag system for every upload.
- [YouTube Tag Finder: How to Find the Right Keywords for More Views](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-tag-finder): How a tag finder pulls real search data, the volume-and-competition filter for rankable keywords, and where to place tags for reach.
- [YouTube Shorts Tagging: How to Use Hashtags and Metadata for More Views](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/shorts-tagging): Why a Short gets zero views as a tagging problem: hashtags vs metadata tags, a 3-tier hashtag framework, and the mistakes that suppress reach.
- [Video Tagging Best Practices: How to Signal Relevance to YouTube and Google in One Workflow](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/video-tagging): Tags as a structured signal to both YouTube and Google: the priority-order method, the 200-300 character discipline, and VideoObject schema.
- [The YouTube Competitor Analysis Method That Finds Algorithm Winners](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-competitor-analysis): Two forensic methods (the Outlier Audit and the Gap Map) plus View Velocity, VPH, and a Reddit cross-check that turn rivals into videos to make.
- [Beyond the Red Arrow: 22+ YouTube Thumbnail Frameworks That Force the Click](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-thumbnail-ideas): 22 click-forcing thumbnail techniques across seven psychological frameworks, plus niche-specific rules for gaming, finance, cooking, and tech.
- [Stop Guessing Clicks: 6 Best AI Thumbnail Testers to Predict CTR Before You Upload](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/thumbnail-tester): Six AI tools that predict thumbnail CTR before upload, what each one measures, and a 4-step workflow to validate a design before wasting impressions.
- [Stop Getting Ignored: The Beginner's Guide to Designing High-CTR YouTube Thumbnails](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-maker): Thumbnail specs, the 3-second visual hierarchy rule, curiosity-gap psychology, tool tiers from Canva to AI, and the CTR testing loop.
- [YouTube Thumbnail Size in 2026: The Specs, Safe Zones, and Mobile Rules That Drive Clicks](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-thumbnail-size): The exact 2026 thumbnail specs, the timestamp dead zone, the file size and format rules, and the mobile-first design choices that win clicks.
- [Beyond the 4,000-Hour Wall: A Strategic Guide to Accelerating YouTube Watch Time (Without Buying Fake Views)](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-watch-hours): The retention math behind 4,000 watch hours: the 10-minute sweet spot, the 30-second hook, live streams, and playlist sequencing.
- [The Profitable YouTube Niche Guide: How to Find Your High-CPM Angle in 2026](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-niche): The highest-paying niches ranked by CPM and RPM, the faceless playbook, and a six-step process to validate a niche before you film.
- [The Business of YouTube: How to Launch a Channel and Monetize from Day One (Not Day 180)](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-as-a-business): A day-one monetization roadmap: high-CPM niche selection, a 70/30 content split, SEO that ranks, and affiliate income before the Partner Program.
- [The 2026 YouTube Channel Optimization Blueprint: Balancing Algorithm Searchability with Human Clickability](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-channel-optimization): A framework for searchability and clickability: channel metadata, video SEO, thumbnail psychology, retention engineering, and the technical wins most skip.
- [Beyond the Scroll: A 5-Step Guide to Mastering the YouTube Shorts Algorithm in 2026](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-shorts-algorithm): How the push-based Shorts algorithm works, why the Viewed vs Swiped Away ratio decides reach, and a Hook-Body-Loop framework with testing cadence.
- [The 2026 YouTube Growth Blueprint: How to Engineer Views and Subscribers From Zero](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/grow-youtube-channel): The growth feedback loop: packaging that earns clicks, retention that satisfies the algorithm, and a weekly review, from niche selection up.
- [YouTube Algorithm 2026: How Discovery Works (Stop Gaming the Bot)](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-algorithm): How the YouTube algorithm works in 2026: the three discovery engines, the three metrics that move the needle, and the myths to stop chasing.
- [What is YouTube SEO? The Complete Guide to Ranking Videos in 2026](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/what-is-youtube-seo): What YouTube SEO is and the complete 2026 ranking framework: keyword research, on-page metadata, engagement signals, and channel authority.
- [The 2026 YouTube SEO Blueprint: Engineering Retention and CTR to Dominate the Algorithm](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-seo-best-practices): The technical playbook to engineer the 6% CTR and 50% retention that trigger Browse and Suggested traffic in 2026.
- [The 5-Pillar YouTube SEO Tool Stack to Dominate the Algorithm (And the Secret CTR Stack)](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/seo-tools-for-youtube): The five-pillar tool stack for keyword research, optimization, competitor intel, CTR, and analytics, all working together.
- [How to Monetize Your YouTube Channel in 2026](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-partner-program): The two-tier Partner Program structure plus a Bridge Strategy that reaches your first paycheck faster than the standard approach.
- [Stop Searching for Generators: The 6-Step Roadmap to 1,000 Free YouTube Subscribers](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/free-subs-on-youtube): A six-step organic roadmap to your first 1,000 subscribers and the monetization threshold, without banned subscriber generators.
- [YouTube Banner Size in 2026: Exact Dimensions, Safe Zone, and How to Never Get Cropped](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-banner-size): The exact 2560x1440 banner spec, the 1546x423 safe zone that decides what mobile shows, and a free tool that previews the crop before you upload.
- [How Much Does YouTube Pay for 1 Million Views? The Real Math (2026)](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-1-million-views): The actual RPM formula behind every "how much does YouTube pay" claim, our own reconciled niche and country numbers, and a free calculator.
- [How to Start a YouTube Video: The Complete Process (and the Hook Most Guides Skip)](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/how-to-start-a-youtube-video): The complete idea-to-upload process, plus the real retention science behind the first 30 seconds that decides whether anyone watches the rest.
- [Cash Cow YouTube Channels in 2026: The Honest Business Model](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/cash-cow-youtube-channels): The production models, real cost math, and why the pure-automation version of the cash cow channel model is getting squeezed in 2026.
- [The 2026 YouTube AI Crackdown: What Gets Demonetized (and the Made-Up Rules You Can Ignore)](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-ai-policy): What YouTube's inauthentic content policy says, the January 2026 enforcement wave, the AI disclosure label rules, the fake thresholds circulating as fact, and the appeal path after demonetization.
